message:
🐛 Fix OAuth callback, reduce agent flickering, add demo data (#448)

* Fix OAuth callback URL, reduce agent polling flickering, add namespace demo data

- Fix OAuth callback URL to point to backend (port 8080) instead of frontend
- Add BackendURL config option for OAuth redirect
- Reduce agent connection flickering by starting in disconnected state
- Use different poll intervals: 15s connected, 2min disconnected
- Fail fast on initial connection (1 failure) vs 2 failures when reconnecting
- Add demo data to useNamespaces hook
- Fix TypeScript error in useCachedData (firstSeen instead of firstTimestamp)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Add top margin to dashboard headers for better spacing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
